nasb.text: And the following day Paul went in with us to James, and all the elders were present.

esv.text: On the following day Paul went in with us to James, and all the elders were present.

cnv.text: 第二天，保羅和我們一同去見雅各，長老們也都在座。

ccb.text: 第二天，保罗和我们去见雅各，众长老都在那里。

csbs.text: 第二天，保罗与我们一起去探望雅各，所有的长老也都来了。
